name: cloud-event-driven-ecommerce
description: Event-driven e-commerce backend built with serverless architecture using AWS services like Lambda, SNS, and SQS.

scripts.start:gateway: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local start-api --template template.yml
scripts.invoke:notify: bun run build:lambdas && cd ./sam && sam local invoke OrderCreatedNotifyUserFunction -e ./events/order-created-sqs-evt.json
